themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 12 verses. Commentary leans on "How can leaders today avoid Rehoboam's mistakes and lead with wisdom rather than pride?".
